2138110.name: One More Dream
2138110.description:
Someone knocks on your door in the middle of the night. You go and check it out but no one is outside your apartment. You know something is wrong.

Features

  • A Linear Story with a focus on exploration and taking around or within an hour to complete.
  • Atmospheric Environments crafted thoughtfully.
  • Free Roam Gamemode. Explore the entire game world at your own pace, without linear horror events impeding progress.
  • Minimal Gameplay Mechanics typical of 'walking simulator' genre.
  • Dynamic lighting. global illumination can be disabled in settings menu.

Follows after the events of Where's Oswald.

There are no jump scares. Confront the past once more in One More Dream.

Note: The linear story is intended to be completed in one sitting and does not autosave.
